title: Pacific Biosciences Of California (PACB) Q4 Losses Highlight Ongoing Profitability Concerns Despite Revenue Base
text: Pacific Biosciences of California (PACB) reported Q4 2025 and full year 2025 financial results showing strong consumables growth but continued net losses. Q4 2025 revenue totaled $44.6 million, up 13.8% year-over-year, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 9.4%. Non-GAAP gross margin was 40% in Q4 2025, up significantly from 31% in Q4 2024, showing notable margin expansion. Consumables revenue grew 15% year-over-year to $21.6 million, representing over 48% of total revenue. Instrument revenue increased 11% to $5.7 million. However, net losses persisted with ongoing challenges related to high operating expenses and capital intensity of the business model. Management highlighted over 100% year-over-year growth in clinical shipments, with clinical accounts representing a growing portion of consumables sales. Despite profitability challenges, the company showed resilience through product innovation and market expansion into clinical genomics and human health applications.
